creator: charlz_klug@mail.ru
text:
To repeat this issue
install /usr/ports/www/sams , /usr/ports/www/apache22, configure apache.
In web-browser enter address "http://[IP_address]/sams/install.php" and
press [Create Database] button. My fix: remove "TYPE=MyISAM"
in /usr/local/share/sams/data/sams_db.sql .
